description: Woman gazing at golden sunset cityscape through window with warm amber light.

Dark cityscape with Rockstar Games text overlay on stormy urban landscape.

Crowded sunny beach with colorful umbrellas, swimmers, and coastal city skyline.
Woman in yellow top celebrates on rooftop with neon signs overlooking city skyline.
